---
title: "R training at dP SPAD"
description: "Training"
author: Ana Valladares
date: "2026-05-01"
image: /images/Cirad.PNG
image-alt: "Formation-cirad picture"
categories:
  - Data handling
  - Biostatistics
  - RStudio
---

**Stats without stress? Oh yes, it’s a match… and we are still going!**

From April 13th to 17th, the [dP SPAD](https://www.dp-spad.org/) (Research and Training Platform in Partnership "High-Altitude Production Systems and Sustainability") in Ambatobe, Madagascar, hosted an intensive week on R, RStudio, and data analysis. But wait, we didn't stop there!

This wasn’t just a one-week workshop; it is an **ongoing learning journey**. One month later, the adventure continues with 10 brilliant PhD students from dP SPAD, CIRAD (French Agricultural Research Centre for International Development), and their partners.

Through online follow-ups and personalized 1-on-1 mentoring, we are breaking down every function and fine-tuning every script to fit their exact research data.

Because let’s be honest: programming in R and statistics shouldn't be so stressful. They are here to make your data speak beautifully!

Kudos to these amazing researchers for their hard work and dedication.

**Want to transform how your team works with data?** If you’d like to learn how to work with data in a clear, useful, and stress-free way with your team, feel free to get in touch.
